senses.example: The crude oil needs processing further into fuel.
senses.example_zh: 原油须经过进一步加工才能成为燃料。

senses.def_en: not carefully or skillfully made; rough
being in a natural condition; not processed or refined; not cooked
senses.def_zh: 自然状态的,原料状态的;生的,未煮过的
senses.example: Coal and oil are important raw materials for the manufacture of plastics. // raw fish
senses.example_zh: 煤和石油是塑料制品的重要原料。// 生鱼

senses.def_zh: 生疏无知的,未经训练的
senses.example: The new teacher is very capable but he's still a bit raw.
senses.example_zh: 这位新教师很能干,但是还缺少点经验。

senses.def_en: an imperfection that causes inadequacy or failure; a shortcoming
senses.example: a hearing defect // I think there are still lots of defects in our educational system.
senses.example_zh: 听力缺陷 // 我认为我们的教育体制还有很多弊病。

senses.example: A number of musicians defected from the Soviet Union to the West in the 1960s.
senses.example_zh: 20 世纪 60 年代,一些音乐家背叛了苏联投奔到西方。

senses.def_en: a small fault or weakness; a small physical problem that makes sth. less valuable
senses.example: The flaw in this vase makes it less valuable.
senses.example_zh: 这个花瓶因为有点瑕疵,不那么值钱了。

senses.def_en: to express strong disapproval of; criticize
senses.example: Adding erotic contents in children's websites should be seriously condemned.
senses.example_zh: 在儿童网站加载色情内容应受到严厉的谴责。

senses.example: He was condemned to death for murder and later hanged.
senses.example_zh: 他因凶杀罪被判处死刑,后被绞死。

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+proach(靠近)→一再向前靠近→责备

senses.def_en: to blame or criticize sb. in a way that shows you are disappointed but not angry
senses.example: She reproached me for my lack of foresight.
senses.example_zh: 她责备我缺乏先见之明。

senses.example: He received a stern rebuke from his superior.
senses.example_zh: 他受到上司的严厉斥责。

senses.example: My boss rebuked me for my habitual carelessness in the work.
senses.example_zh: 我的上司责备我工作上一贯粗心。

senses.def_en: not real; existing only in your mind or imagination
senses.example: The main characters in the novel are very true to life, but most of them are imaginary.
senses.example_zh: 小说里的人物写得栩栩如生,但大多是虚构的。

senses.def_en: having or showing an ability to think of new and interesting ideas
senses.example: The examiner was looking for imaginative answers.
senses.example_zh: 主考人希望找到具有丰富想象力的答卷。

senses.def_en: to invent or plan (sth. that is difficult or complicated)
senses.example: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
senses.example_zh: 她发明了一种加快办公室之间交流的办法。

extras.title: raw
extras.content: in the raw 处在自然状态的;裸体的 Some nameless Indian tribes are living in the raw. 一些不知名的印第安部落过着未开化的生活。

extras.title: imaginary, imaginative
extras.content: Anything imaginary is the products of an imaginative person's mind. 任何虚构的东西都是有想象力的人的思想产物。
